ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Input the absolute path to your kindle's text file. Examples: windows: E:\documents\My clippings.txt, macOS: /Volumes/Kindle/documents/My Clippings.txt, linux: /media/username/Kindle/documents/My Clippings.txt
ast.target: 输入您Kindle文本文件的绝对路径。示例：Windows: E:\\documents\\My clippings.txt, macOS: /Volumes/Kindle/documents/My Clippings.txt, Linux: /media/username/Kindle/documents/My Clippings.txt

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where synced kindle highlights will be stored.
ast.target: 同步的Kindle高亮将存储在此文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep all sync behavior local-only, with no external services or network requests.
ast.target: 保持所有同步行为仅限本地，不使用外部服务或网络请求。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find My Clippings.txt. Please set the path manually.
ast.target: 未找到My Clippings.txt。请手动设置路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Kindle highlights or notes found to sync.
ast.target: 未找到可同步的Kindle高亮或笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to sync My Clippings.txt. Check the file path, format, and target folder.
ast.target: 同步My Clippings.txt失败。请检查文件路径、格式和目标文件夹。
